faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about NandedSeva
faq.q1: How quickly can I get a technician?
faq.a1: For most home services, we provide same-day or next-day service. For urgent requests, contact us directly on WhatsApp for faster response.
faq.a2: Yes, all our professionals are background-verified, trained, and carry a NandedSeva ID. We only work with trusted, experienced workers from Nanded.
faq.q3: Do you provide drivers for outstation trips?
faq.a3: Yes! We offer drivers for full-day hire, outstation trips, Nanded to Hyderabad, Nanded to Pune, and airport pickups. All drivers are experienced and verified.
faq.a4: Absolutely! Just WhatsApp us at +91 84212 22893 with your service requirement and address. It's the fastest way to book.
faq.q5: What areas of Nanded do you serve?
faq.a5: We serve all areas across Nanded city including Shivajinagar, Vazirabad, Naganpura, Vishnupuri, Cidco, and surrounding areas.
faq.a6: We operate from 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM, 7 days a week. For emergencies, you can WhatsApp us anytime and we'll respond as soon as possible.
